title: Client Particles Emitter Shape Entity Aabb
description: Emits particles from random positions within the attached entity's axis-aligned bounding box. The emission volume automatically scales with entity size, making it perfect for body-covering effects like burning, freezing, poison clouds, healing auras, or damage feedback that should wrap around creatures of any size.

direction.title: Direction
direction.description: The direction of particle emission. Can be a string ('inwards' or 'outwards'), or an array of [x, y, z] Molang expressions.
